THE ONE SHOW
FINALISTS | CEREMONY

The One Show is where the world's best ideas rise to the top. For over 50 years, the Pencil has stood as one of the most respected honors in advertising, design, and beyond. And at the pinnacle: the Crystal Pencil, awarded only to Best of Discipline winners—peer-to-peer recognition from a jury of over 300 global creative leaders.

Winning here is hard. That's why it matters. The One Show represents integrity, bold thinking, and the highest level of creative excellence across the industry.

With disciplines spanning the full spectrum of creativity—from timeless formats like Print and Film to cutting-edge categories in Gaming, Creative Use of AI, and the brand-new Creator Content discipline—The One Show continues to evolve alongside the work it honors.

Winners are celebrated on May 15, 2026, during Creative Week in New York City—a week-long global festival from The One Club for Creativity, the world's foremost nonprofit supporting and celebrating the creative community.

CELEBRATE WITH US

The One Show 2026 Ceremony returns on May 15 as the culminating night of Creative Week—an evening dedicated to celebrating the ideas and makers shaping culture today. Held at the iconic Cipriani Wall Street, the night unfolds in a setting of grandeur and high glamour, where the industry gathers to honor its most exceptional work. Hosted by Leslie Jones, whose bold, high-voltage presence promises moments of raucous fun alongside the celebration, this is where creativity is recognized at its highest level—and where the energy of the room is as unforgettable as the work itself.

Learn More and Get Tickets
THE ONE SHOW 2027

The One Show 2027 will be open for entry this fall. We'll be looking for your best work, follow along @theoneshowawards and @theoneclubforcreativity to be the first to know when we re-open for entry.

REVISITING THE ONE SHOW 2025

The world's leading celebration of creative excellence brought together brilliant ideas, bold voices, and unforgettable moments. From the year's winning work and global creative rankings to the juries who set the standard, The One Show 2025 was a season to remember.

Dive back into the highlights—explore the winners, see who topped the rankings, meet the jury, browse event photos, and gain insights from this year's report.

WINNERS

Explore the groundbreaking work that earned Pencils across all disciplines. From Gold to Merit, discover the ideas that defined excellence in 2025.

View Winners
RANKINGS

See which agencies, brands, networks, and production companies led the industry. The rankings reveal who earned the most Pencils in 2025.

View Rankings
JURY

Meet the global panel of creative leaders who judged The One Show 2025. Their expertise and high standards defined what rose to the top.

View Jury
INSIGHTS REPORT

Dive into the data and trends that shaped The One Show 2025. Analysis, statistics, and key findings from the year's competition.

View Report
    
HISTORY & LEGACY

Since its founding in 1973 by a group of passionate New York copywriters and art directors, The One Show has stood as one of the most prestigious and influential awards in advertising and design. For over 50 years, it has recognized the ideas, craft, and innovation that move culture forward—serving as a benchmark of creative excellence across the globe. To enter and win a One Show Pencil is to join a legacy shared by the industry's most celebrated talents and agencies. It signifies not just exceptional work, but work that endures—proof that creativity, when done right, has the power to define brands, inspire audiences, and shape the future of the creative industry.

GOLD / SILVER / BRONZE PENCILS

Icons of achievement that honor ideas distinguished by brilliance, craft, and lasting impact

CRYSTAL PENCIL

Awarded to Best of Disciplines, Best of Non-Profit, and the year's top ranked winners—including agencies, production studios, networks, and more

BLACK PENCIL

The pinnacle honor—recognizing the single most defining idea of the year

CREATIVE MARKETER

Honoring a senior brand leader whose vision and bravery elevate creativity as a core driver of success

GREEN PENCIL

Celebrating creativity that helps our planet thrive

SDG PENCIL

Honoring ideas that drive global progress

FUSION PENCIL

Recognizing creativity rooted in equity and inclusion

PENTA PENCIL

Awarding enduring excellence in brand-agency partnership

THE ONE SHOW

The One Show is the world's most prestigious award show in advertising and design. For over 50 years, the Gold Pencil has been regarded as one of the top prizes in the creative industry. The One Show has a rich legacy of honoring some of the most groundbreaking ideas, created by some of the most remarkable minds in creativity.

THE PROGRAM
THE DETAILS
THE REQUIREMENTS
THE DEADLINE
APPLY NOW
APPLY
THE PROGRAM

ONE Creator Lab is a 16-week program that requires a commitment of 10-15 hours per week. During this time, you will attend online classes, solve briefs, and give regular presentations that showcase your ability to think critically. You will also receive mentorship, give and receive feedback, and learn to create content across platforms in an ever-evolving industry driven by culture.

THE DETAILS

The Fall 2026 semester will run from August 4 to December 8, 2026, with our online lectures taking place on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 5:00-7:00 PM ET.

THE REQUIREMENTS

All applicants must be:

Interested in pursuing a Content Creation role at an advertising agency or brand
Able to attend all online sessions and assignments throughout the program
Based in the United States
18 years or older
THE PROCESS

We know application processes can seem overwhelming, so here's a quick look at ours to ensure you understand what next steps look like:

APPLY

Once you apply, we ask for your patience while our team reviews your application.

VIDEO ASSIGNMENT

If you are selected to move forward in the process, you’ll create and submit a 30-60 sec. TikTok-style video that describes the type of creator you are and why you are a good fit for the program.

FINAL SELECTIONS

Once we've identified our final selections, we'll extend an offer.

START DATE

After completing your onboarding paperwork, you're all set to start the program on Tuesday, August 4.

THE DEADLINE

Applications close on June 15, 2026.

APPLY NOW
